content: Just as The Locomo’s snack bar curates a sequence of accessible, sequentially ordered treats for visitors to consume over an extended outing, step-by-step Chain of Thought reasoning can be embedded as structured, intermediately stored "snack-sized" memory markers in LoCoMo’s long-term conversational memory evaluation framework. This transforms long-term memory testing from just recalling disconnected facts into assessing whether an LLM agent retains the logical reasoning chain that led to past conclusions across very long conversations.
